historical_behavioral_transcripts.note: Existing raw model transcripts predate the two-plugin split. Current isolated forward tests are summarized in verification/REPORT.md.

environment_notes: Both plugin IDs were independently discovered and installed by Claude Code and Codex.
Each canonical skill matched its Claude and Codex cache copy by SHA-256.
Temporary installations, Marketplace registrations, caches, and generated local settings were removed after capture.
